languages.text: "Священные встроенные ауспик-системы регистрируют богохульную неправильность и смущены невозможностью удовлетворить императив Поиска Знаний".
"The sacred embedded auspexes are registering blasphemous irregularity and are confounded by the inability to satisfy the Quest for Knowledge imperative."
languages.original_text: "Священные встроенные ауспик-системы регистрируют богохульную неправильность и смущены невозможностью удовлетворить императив Поиска Знаний".

languages.text: 「情報提供: 聖なる埋め込み型監視装置は、冒涜的な不規則性を検知し、知識の追求の義務を満たせないことに困惑している」
languages.original_text: "Providing information: the sacred embedded auspexes are registering blasphemous irregularity and are confounded by the inability to satisfy the Quest for Knowledge imperative."

traits.locale_text: 「情報提供: 聖なる埋め込み型監視装置は、冒涜的な不規則性を検知し、知識の追求の義務を満たせないことに困惑している」

languages.text: «Los aúspexes sagrados engastados registran una irregularidad blasfema y sienten confusión al no poder satisfacer el imperativo de la búsqueda del conocimiento».
languages.original_text: "The sacred embedded auspexes are registering blasphemous irregularity and are confounded by the inability to satisfy the Quest for Knowledge imperative."

traits.locale_text: «Los aúspexes sagrados engastados registran una irregularidad blasfema y sienten confusión al no poder satisfacer el imperativo de la búsqueda del conocimiento».

languages.text: "Die heiligen eingebetteten Auspizien registrieren eine blasphemische Unregelmäßigkeit und sind ob der Unmöglichkeit, das Gebot der Wissenssuche zu erfüllen, bestürzt."
languages.original_text: "The sacred embedded auspexes are registering blasphemous irregularity and are confounded by the inability to satisfy the Quest for Knowledge imperative."

traits.locale_text: "Die heiligen eingebetteten Auspizien registrieren eine blasphemische Unregelmäßigkeit und sind ob der Unmöglichkeit, das Gebot der Wissenssuche zu erfüllen, bestürzt."

languages.text: « Les auspex sacrés signalent la présence d'irrégularités blasphématoires et ne sont pas en mesure de faire progresser la Quête de la Connaissance. »
languages.original_text: "The sacred embedded auspexes are registering blasphemous irregularity and are confounded by the inability to satisfy the Quest for Knowledge imperative."

traits.locale_text: « Les auspex sacrés signalent la présence d'irrégularités blasphématoires et ne sont pas en mesure de faire progresser la Quête de la Connaissance. »

languages.text: “神圣内置鸟卜仪正在记录亵渎性的异常读数，并因无法满足求知远征强制指令而陷入了逻辑混乱。”
languages.original_text: "The sacred embedded auspexes are registering blasphemous irregularity and are confounded by the inability to satisfy the Quest for Knowledge imperative."

traits.locale_text: “神圣内置鸟卜仪正在记录亵渎性的异常读数，并因无法满足求知远征强制指令而陷入了逻辑混乱。”

languages.text: "Kutsal gömülü uzgörenler, kâfirce bir düzensizlik kaydediyor ve İrfan Arayışı buyruğunu yerine getirememekten dolayı şaşkınlık yaşıyor."
languages.original_text: "The sacred embedded auspexes are registering blasphemous irregularity and are confounded by the inability to satisfy the Quest for Knowledge imperative."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal gömülü uzgörenler, kâfirce bir düzensizlik kaydediyor ve İrfan Arayışı buyruğunu yerine getirememekten dolayı şaşkınlık yaşıyor."
